title: archidendron oppositum
intro: Archidendron oppositum, also known as the "Sangkayi" or "Sengkuang", is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The extracts of Archidendron oppositum have been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are often used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be consumed to alleviate various health issues.
